name: linSlFSMSetGlobal
title: linSlFSMSetGlobal
syntax: void linSlFSMSetGlobal(unsigned int slaveId, unsigned int numberOfStates);
description: Sets the number of states given in numberOfStates for the Slave with identifier slaveId.
This function must be called before the Slave's states are configured.

parameters.name: slaveId
parameters.description: Identifier of the relevant Slave. Corresponds to the slaveId, that was defined with linSlSimulate.
